title: hieracium murorum subsp. moruloides
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. moruloides is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, a member of the dandelion family and a perennial herb. It is also known as Hawkweed, a plant traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, thanks to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. moruloides, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its health benefits.
